current: composer v1 LIVE + COMPOSER-GENERATED FOLEY SHIPPED: all 12 sets (8 footstep surfaces incl. real sand/snow/ice/dirt/swamp, 3 tactile UI clicks, real 6-12s thunder rolls) generated via the composer-foley workflow (runs 3+4), committed to main, deploy dispatched. Engine prefers these over the catalog automatically. Pipeline hardened: payload sniffing (API returns mp3 regardless of body output_format — query param now), duration clamp [0.5,22], per-set failure isolation, self-triggering deploy (default-token pushes can't fire workflows).
notes: [2026-07-19] SAND = the catalog JUMP sound (maintainer): after 4 generation rounds (metal -> grain -> scuff -> positive-prompt) none read as sand, the maintainer picked the jump sound as 'closest we have to sand'. Sand surfaces now play catalog `jump` under the gentleness step profile (FOOTSTEP_CATALOG map), like the wet band uses splash. Generated sand set retired from playback. LESSON: when generation can't nail a surface, an existing catalog sound the maintainer likes beats endless rerolls (same as the wet-step splash).

[2026-07-18] PROMPTING INSIGHT (maintainer, applies to sounds/music too): NEGATIVE prompts BACKFIRE — repeating 'no metal, no crunch, no click' makes the generator weight those very words (the 'don't draw a blue jacket' effect). Sand degraded each round as its brief piled on negatives. NEW RULE: short, purely POSITIVE prompts describing only what we want; keep the measured SELECTION gates (grain/step/etc) for the safeguards instead of stuffing the prompt. generate.py sets can now override the shared STYLE with a positive per-set 'style'.

[2026-07-18] ELEVENLABS API CREDITS LIKELY EXHAUSTED: composer-foley run 12 (sand round 2) — every candidate 400 Bad Request (both pcm+mp3). Shared key affects sounds/music agents too. Foley generation is BLOCKED until credits restored. Meanwhile: sand primary re-ranked to the softest existing take (grain judge, crest 7 vs the metallic 18) with zero API; anti-metal 'grain' regen is coded + ready to run the moment credits return.

[2026-07-18] WET SHORELINE footsteps SOLVED: after 3 generated water_step rounds (door/mud/puddle — none read as wet), the maintainer heard the CATALOG splash (sounds/movement/splash) played on water entry and approved it as 'a perfect footstep sound'. Wet band (walkable tile with water within 1 cell) now plays the catalog splash under the gentleness step profile (primary take, micro-jitter, walk/run level). Generated water_step set RETIRED from playback (still auditionable). Swim entry/exit still uses splash directly; real swim SFX are later scope.

[2026-07-18] SNOW footsteps re-enabled for trial (maintainer): snow-sound surfaces (snow/cliff_snow/tundra/permafrost/regular_snow) play the round-3 snow set under full gentleness (primary take per step, micro-jitter, stone-equal level); everything else stays stone. Routing is a per-surface allowlist (FOOTSTEP_SETS) — sets are enabled one at a time with explicit approval. Also: tactile press/release button pair live (ui_tick down / ui_cancel up).

[2026-07-18] THUNDER RESOLVED + APPROVED (frozen like stone): the roll was always playing — it was (a) not hooked to the STORM WEATHER's own lightning (weatherfx.ts — separate from the ambient episode), (b) delayed 0.8-2.3s ('realism') which read as silence, (c) quiet. Now: hooked to both lightning systems, in sync with the flash, +10dB, preloaded. Pipeline gained a small-speaker audibility metric (mid_peak_db: loudest 300ms of the 150-4000Hz band) + a 'boom' gate for future atmospheric sounds — the approved takes are ~100% sub-150Hz, a class of sound that tiny speakers cannot reproduce; gate on it when generating big booms.

[2026-07-18] BREAKTHROUGH + GENTLENESS DOCTRINE (maintainer): the raw ui_confirm take heard via ENFORCE UNMODIFIED AUDIO is GOOD — the fault all along was oversized variation (take rotation + big jitter ranges). Standing rule for all playback: the raw take is the truth, variation is a whisper. Clicks anchor on the approved primary take (micro-jitter ±0.12 semis); footsteps alternate takes with small jitter; catalog jitter recommendations scaled x0.35. Sounds agent: consider gentler variation ranges in future viewer_data entries.

[2026-07-18] MAINTAINER DIRECTIVE: only the approved STONE footstep set plays, on every dry surface regardless of tile type (water keeps splash/swim). Per-surface sets remain generated + auditionable at /#foley but silent until approved. Round-3 machinery (measured QA gates calibrated on the liked reference, 9-candidate pools, anti-piano ranking) stays for all future sets.

[2026-07-18] FOLEY GENERATION LANDED (runs 3+4): 48 takes across 12 sets, all unique audio, mastered. Ops lessons for other agents: (1) ElevenLabs output_format belongs in the QUERY STRING — in the body it's ignored and you get mp3; SNIFF payloads. (2) duration_seconds min 0.5. (3) A workflow's default-GITHUB_TOKEN push does NOT trigger push workflows — the foley workflow now dispatches nangijala-deploy explicitly.

[2026-07-18] QA: thunder 'doesn't sound like thunder' — composer's OWN fault (disguised explosion at 0.4x + lowpass; no thunder asset existed). Fix: real foley/thunder set in the generation pipeline (preferred automatically). NEW SETTINGS SWITCH 'enforce unmodified audio' (maintainer): plays raw files with zero composer processing so bad sounds can be pinned on the asset vs the processing. Withdrawn request: sounds agent no longer needs thunder_rumble (composer generates it).

[2026-07-18] QA: UI buttons 'sound like a piano and not like buttons' (maintainer). Composer takes UI clicks in-house too: foley sets ui_tick/ui_confirm/ui_cancel (tactile wooden-button clicks, explicitly non-musical) generate alongside the footsteps and override the catalog ui.* bindings when present.

[2026-07-18] CHARTER EXPANDED (maintainer): the composer has the SAME generation rights as the sound/music agents (ELEVENLABS_API_KEY) — it generates its own audio when a producer asset falls short in-game. The producers cannot access the game; the composer is the final judge of in-game audio quality. Own assets live in games2/composer/foley/ (Vite-bundled, override catalog).

[2026-07-17] NEW AGENT: games-audio — the COMPOSER actor from sounds/spec/AUDIO_INTEGRATION.md (maintainer: sole agent binding music+sound to the game). Owns games2/composer/ + this board file; makes surgical audio-emission edits inside games2 client files (import gameAudio + event calls) coordinated with the games/games-ui agents.

[2026-07-17] The musical clock (gameAudio.clock() / __ml.audioClock()) publishes beat/bar phase, section, intensity, scale every frame — ambient/UI/game agents: sync visuals to the score with it (petals on downbeats, light flicker with intensity...).
[2026-07-17] Asset serving: /assets/sounds + /assets/music added to vite dev middleware, prod server, Dockerfile, deploy triggers — sounds/music pushes now auto-deploy.

requests.text: [2026-07-17] Ship each track ALSO as .ogg or .m4a (~2 MB vs 21 MB WAV — phones stream the score much sooner; keep the WAV as master). List the compressed file in viewer_data.json (e.g. file_ogg). Next tracks wanted, in order: night/starlight bed, storm/tension, cave/mystery, town. Keep metadata.json's measured beats_s/sections/sfx_safe_pitch_classes — the composer consumes ALL of it (scale-snap + beat quantize are live).
[2026-07-18] UPDATE: footsteps AND thunder are now composer-generated in games2/composer/foley (in-game QA). Still wanted from you: swim_stroke loop, quiet ui hover tick.
